Lukasz Kaiser | TEDAI Vienna • September 2025 Machine learning researcher Lukasz Kaiser unpacks a quiet revolution in AI: models that don't just spit out the most likely next word but internally "think," calculate and use tools. appliedRows.title: IA Summit 2024: From SaaS to Agents With Mustafa Suleyman
appliedRows.text: Evidence quote: A Conversation between Mustafa Suleyman, Microsoft AI CEO, and Soma Somasegar, Madrona Managing Director Selection reason: 权威投资机构主办的峰会记录，明确包含Mustafa Suleyman关于AI代理的讨论，可补强原来源。 Source preview: Skip to content Madrona News October 9, 2024 IA Summit 2024 Fireside Chat: From SaaS to Agents With Mustafa Suleyman A Conversation between Mustafa Suleyman, Microsoft AI CEO, and Soma Somasegar, Madrona Managing Director It was a pleasure hosting the third annual IA Summit in person on October 2, 2024.
